title: limonium puberulum
intro: Limonium puberulum, also known as woolly sea lavender, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Plumbaginaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Limonium puberulum include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
